query:
INSERT INTO radio_channels (stationId, name, genre, frequency, status, currentListeners, totalListeners, streamUrl, metadata) VALUES
(870003, 'RRB Worship & Devotional', 'Gospel & Faith', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"Multi-faith worship and devotional music","icon":"Church","channelId":"ch-032"}'),
(870003, 'RRB Women in Music', 'Special', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"Celebrating women artists across all genres","icon":"Heart","channelId":"ch-034"}'),
(870003, 'RRB Indie & Underground', 'Rock & Alternative', '440', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"Independent and underground artists","icon":"Disc","channelId":"ch-035"}'),
(870003, 'RRB World Fusion', 'World & Culture', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"Global music fusion and cross-cultural sounds","icon":"Globe","channelId":"ch-036"}'),
(870003, 'RRB Throwback Radio', 'Classics & Heritage', '440', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"70s, 80s, 90s, and 2000s greatest hits","icon":"Clock","channelId":"ch-037"}'),
(870003, 'RRB Love Songs', 'Jazz & Soul', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"Romantic ballads and love songs across all eras","icon":"Heart","channelId":"ch-038"}'),
(870003, 'RRB Open Mic', 'Special', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"community","description":"Community open mic, freestyle, and live performances","icon":"Mic","channelId":"ch-050"}'),
(870003, 'C.J. Battle Radio', 'Hip-Hop & Urban', '432', 'active', 0, 0, NULL, '{"category":"music","description":"C.J. Battle artist station — music available on all major platforms","icon":"Music","channelId":"ch-051","isArtistStation":true,"platformLinks":{"spotify":"https://open.spotify.com/artist/2kFnLPBd40yxliDHZZpAPy","appleMusic":"https://music.apple.com/us/artist/c-j-battle/1438716457","soundcloud":"https://soundcloud.com/cjbttle","tidal":"https://tidal.com/artist/10464604","deezer":"https://www.deezer.com/en/artist/52608732","youtube":"https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCR_UZEE4FkpCR9THocyutkQ","instagram":"https://www.instagram.com/c.j.battle/"}}');
